summary: Comprehensive testing of Partner Data Access Control and Admin Dashboard Widget features for Konekt B2B platform. Backend: 13/13 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All critical flows verified working. Partner data access control correctly strips client data for service partners while allowing logistics/distributor partners to see delivery details.

integration_issues.issue: /admin/service-tasks route not implemented in frontend - CTA links correctly but page doesn't exist

action_items: Create /admin/service-tasks page in frontend to handle CTA deep-linking from dashboard widget
critical_code_review_comments: Partner Data Access Control working correctly - is_logistics flag and partner_type returned in API
Logistics partners (distributor/delivery/logistics) correctly see client_name and delivery details
Service partners would have null values for client_name, delivery_address, contact_person, contact_phone
Admin Dashboard Partner Response Pipeline widget renders correctly with awaiting/overdue counts
CTA button correctly links to /admin/service-tasks (or /admin/service-tasks?filter=overdue when overdue tasks exist)
Service Task Stats API returns correct breakdown: assigned=4, cost_submitted=2, in_progress=4, total=13
Payment Queue status normalization working - pending/pending_verification mapped to 'uploaded'
Admin Orders payer_name waterfall working correctly including billing.invoice_client_name

success_rate.frontend: 95% (all critical flows verified, minor route missing)

test_credentials: Admin: admin@konekt.co.tz / KnktcKk_L-hw1wSyquvd!, Partner: demo.partner@konekt.com / Partner123!
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created - used existing test data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Partner Data Access Control verified working. Demo partner is 'distributor' type (is_logistics=true) so they CAN see client data. To test service partner data stripping, would need a partner with partner_type='service' or 'product'. Admin Dashboard widget shows 4 Awaiting, 2 To Review with View Tasks CTA. Service Tasks page route (/admin/service-tasks) needs to be created in frontend.

backend_endpoints: GET /api/partner-portal/assigned-work - returns is_logistics flag and partner_type
GET /api/partner-portal/assigned-work - logistics partners see client_name, delivery_address, contact_person, contact_phone
GET /api/admin/service-tasks/stats/summary - returns task counts (assigned=4, awaiting_cost=0, cost_submitted=2, in_progress=4, total=13)
GET /api/admin/service-tasks/overdue-costs - returns empty list (no overdue tasks)
GET /api/admin/service-tasks - returns list of all service tasks
frontend_features: Admin Dashboard - Partner Response Pipeline widget with 4 Awaiting, 2 To Review pills
Admin Dashboard - View Tasks CTA button linking to /admin/service-tasks
Admin Dashboard - KPI row, Operations/Finance/Commercial/Partners snapshots
Partner Assigned Work page - Scope column in table (not Client column)
Partner Assigned Work page - Task drawer shows Client info for logistics partners
Partner Assigned Work page - KPI cards (Assigned, Awaiting Cost, In Progress, Completed, Delayed)
